personality.notes: The old hand of the stable. Younger horses follow his lead. Rarely hurried, rarely rattled.

genetics.notes: Placeholder genetics — full gene system coming soon.

abilities.name: Herd Calm
abilities.description: While grazing, nearby horses recover mood faster.

abilities.name: Trail Wise
abilities.description: During Travel, warns the herd of incoming obstacles slightly earlier.

abilities.name: Deep Sleep
abilities.description: Heals double HP per sleep tick but wakes up very hungry.
